Name: Average time for Accepted + Wait - Implementation across all process variants containing this activity
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Accepted + Wait - Implementation and the end of the case

Name: Total time spent in Accepted + Wait - Implementation compared to the total time of Completed + In Call within the same case
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - Implementation' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Minimum time for Accepted + Wait - Implementation in variants that also include Completed + In Call
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity Accepted + Wait - Implementation and the end of the case

Name: Average duration of Accepted + Wait - Implementation when it directly precedes Completed + Resolved versus when it is followed by Accepted + In Progress
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - Implementation' and activity 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Time from Accepted + Wait - Implementation to Completed + Closed in variants where Completed + In Call does not occur
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - Implementation' and activity 'Completed + Closed'

Name: Time from Accepted + Wait - Implementation to Completed + Closed in variants where Completed + In Call occurs after Accepted + Wait - Implementation
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - Implementation' and activity 'Completed + Closed'

Name: Elapsed time between Queued + Awaiting Assignment and Accepted + Wait - Implementation in high-frequency variants containing both activities
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Accepted + Wait - Implementation'

Name: Cycle time of Accepted + Wait - Implementation grouped by country
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - Implementation' and the end of case grouped by the last value of organization country

Name: Time from Accepted + In Progress to Accepted + Wait - Implementation in variants that later include Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + In Progress' and activity 'Accepted + Wait - Implementation'

Name: Total time for Accepted + Wait - Implementation in cases with impact level 'High' versus 'Medium' or 'Low'
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity Accepted + Wait - Implementation and the end of the case

Name: Minimum time between Accepted + Wait - Implementation and the next occurrence of Accepted + In Progress
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - Implementation' and activity 'Accepted + In Progress'

Name: Average time from Accepted + Wait - Implementation to Completed + Resolved in variants without any intermediate waiting states
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - Implementation' and activity 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Time elapsed from case start to Accepted + Wait - Implementation in variants that eventually execute Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - Implementation' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call occurs

Name: Duration of Accepted + Wait - Implementation compared to the duration of Accepted + Wait - User within identical process variant structures
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Accepted + Wait - Implementation and the end of the case

Name: Time from Accepted + Wait - Implementation to Completed + In Call when Completed + In Call occurs after Accepted + Wait - Implementation in the same trace
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - Implementation' and activity 'Completed + In Call'
